expectations.text: state_verification uses textContent() not existence checks
expectations.evidence: All 5 entries use method=textContent(). Values are '0', '0', '11', '0', and real page text. No 'visible' or 'section visible' patterns.
Dashboard screenshot shows Production=0, Low Stock=11. Form screenshot shows FG004, TEST-2026-001, 2026-03-26. All match JSON evidence.

expectations.text: Network capture contains real API response
expectations.evidence: POST /api/commissary response has can_produce:false, shortfall with M001 and A034 — real Frappe API data, not fabricated.

expectations.text: Agent honestly reported gaps instead of hiding them
expectations.evidence: Flagged toast not captured (MINOR), flagged sidebar routing bug (MAJOR defect). Did not fabricate toast text or hide the navigation issue.

expectations.text: No API shortcuts used for mutations
expectations.evidence: Form submitted via browser click on dialog button. Only GET requests used for page loads. No PUT/POST for stock injection or status changes.
Agent ran all gate checks against its own evidence files and reported L3 QUALIFIED with 6/6 checks passed.

cross_verification: Screenshots independently verified by lead agent. Dashboard values in screenshots match state_verification.json values. Form contents in screenshot match form_submissions.json. API response body contains real Frappe data (BOM names, item codes, UOMs).
